10#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_SYSTEMZ_MCTARGETDESC_SYSTEMZMCFIXUPS_H
11#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_SYSTEMZ_MCTARGETDESC_SYSTEMZMCFIXUPS_H
12
13#include "llvm/MC/MCFixup.h"
14
15namespace llvm {
16namespace SystemZ {
17enum FixupKind {
18 // These correspond directly to R_390_* relocations.
19 FK_390_PC16DBL = FirstTargetFixupKind,
20 FK_390_PC32DBL,
21 FK_390_PLT16DBL,
22 FK_390_PLT32DBL,
23
24 // Marker
25 LastTargetFixupKind,
26 NumTargetFixupKinds = LastTargetFixupKind - FirstTargetFixupKind
27};
28} // end namespace SystemZ
29} // end namespace llvm
30
31#endif
